parts.title: Transcript
parts.annotated_transcript_html:
Speaker 1: Thank you for calling Smartbank. You're speaking to James. How can I help you?

Speaker 2: Oh, hello. I'm interested in opening a new account, and I was hoping to get some information.

Speaker 1: Certainly. Is there a monthly charge for having an account?

Speaker 2: Well, there's an introductory offer where initially it's just €2.50 a month to have an account.

Speaker 1: And does it stay at that or go up?

Speaker 2: That's just for the first and second month, and from then on, it's €6 per month. It's automatically deducted from your balance.

Speaker 1: Oh, you don't have any free accounts, then?

Speaker 2: No, but we do have a range of benefits. Our customers can either get two complementary tickets to the cinema, which you can use our banking app to book, or alternatively, you can subscribe to a magazine, which will be sent to your home at no charge.

Speaker 1: Okay, so in terms of the actual banking, what can you offer your customers?

Speaker 2: Well, we pride ourselves on first-class customer service. So if you phone us, we guarantee that if you don't get through, a call handler will return your call in no more than 90 minutes. But actually, the average wait time is only about 35 seconds.

Speaker 1: That's good. It often takes five minutes to get through to my current bank.

Speaker 2: Yes, we know how frustrating that can be. Now, I think I saw something on your website about helping get money off insurance for your customers. Is that right?

Speaker 1: That's correct. We have a number of generous offers for our customers with a range of providers.

Speaker 2: Oh, right. Well, that sounds interesting. And for me, really, any bank that I use has to be green. That's really my main consideration. So the question is, are you?

Speaker 1: Absolutely. 100%. In terms of the power for our buildings, our investment and lending policies, and so on. There's more about that on our website.

Speaker 2: Great. Well, I'll look later. So, yeah, I'd like to open an account then, please.
